title: create_task: happy path
definition_of_done: Task lands in backlog with a UUID id and correct Fibonacci estimation
description: Create a valid task and confirm it lands in backlog, has a UUID id, and correct Fibonacci estimation derived from predictedKTokens

title: create_task: Fibonacci estimation derivation
definition_of_done: Varying predictedKTokens values produce correct Fibonacci estimations per the kTokens formula
description: Create tasks with various predictedKTokens values (1, 8, 20) and verify the derived estimation matches the Fibonacci nearest-neighbor formula

title: create_task: validation failure on missing required field
definition_of_done: Attempting to create a task with a missing required field returns a -32602 or -32003 error
description: Attempt to create a task with a missing required field and expect a validation error (-32602 invalid params or -32003)

title: list_tasks: filter by status
definition_of_done: list_tasks with status=backlog returns only backlog tasks
description: Call list_tasks with status=backlog and confirm only backlog-status tasks are returned

title: list_tasks: wildcard returns all statuses
definition_of_done: list_tasks with status=* returns tasks regardless of status
description: Call list_tasks with status=* and confirm all tasks are returned regardless of their status

title: list_tasks: empty result for status with no tasks
definition_of_done: list_tasks with a status that has no tasks returns an empty array
description: Call list_tasks with a status that has no tasks (e.g., done initially) and confirm an empty array is returned

title: current_task: FIFO ordering
definition_of_done: current_task returns the task with the earliest in_progress_since when multiple tasks are in_progress
description: Move two tasks to in_progress and confirm current_task returns the one with the earlier in_progress_since timestamp

title: current_task: error when no in_progress tasks
definition_of_done: current_task returns -32006 error when no in_progress tasks exist for the session
description: Call current_task when there are no in_progress tasks for the session and expect a -32006 no_current_task error

title: update_task: valid transition backlog → todo → in_progress
definition_of_done: Task successfully moves from backlog to todo to in_progress
description: Move a task from backlog → todo → in_progress and confirm each transition succeeds

title: update_task: need_info requires comment
definition_of_done: Attempting to move to need_info without a comment returns -32004 error
description: Attempt to transition a task to need_info without providing a comment and expect -32004 missing_comment error

title: update_task: blocked requires non-empty comment
definition_of_done: Attempting to move to blocked with empty comment content returns -32003 validation error
description: Attempt to transition a task to blocked with an empty comment content and expect -32003 validation_error

title: update_task: reply cycle completes need_info
definition_of_done: After replying to all need_info comments, task can transition out of need_info successfully
description: Post a need_info comment, reply to it via update_task with the same comment id, then successfully transition out of need_info

comments.title: Reply cycle test
comments.content: Does the reply cycle unlock the need_info block?
comments.reply: Yes — once all need_info comments have a non-empty reply, the transition succeeds.

title: update_task: invalid transition done → in_progress
definition_of_done: Attempting done → in_progress returns -32002 transition_not_allowed error
description: Move a task to done, then attempt to transition it to in_progress and expect -32002 transition_not_allowed error

title: update_task: second in_progress requires justification
definition_of_done: Moving a second task to in_progress for the same session without a comment fails with -32003
description: With one task already in_progress for the session, attempt to move a second task to in_progress without a comment and expect -32003

comments.title: Justification for second in_progress
comments.content: Need T15 in_progress to complete its lifecycle alongside T7 for FIFO test.

title: edit_task: mutable fields update correctly [EDITED]
definition_of_done: title, description, definition_of_done all persist after edit_task — confirmed by reading back via list_tasks
description: This description was updated via edit_task to verify mutation works correctly.

title: edit_task: predictedKTokens re-derives estimation
definition_of_done: Updating predictedKTokens via edit_task changes estimation to the correct Fibonacci value
description: Call edit_task with a new predictedKTokens value and confirm the estimation field is updated to the correct Fibonacci derivation

title: edit_task: status field rejected
definition_of_done: Attempting to edit status via edit_task returns -32003 validation error
description: Attempt to pass a status field in edit_task input and confirm a -32003 validation error is returned (status changes must go through update_task)

title: Review: update_task: valid transition backlog → todo → in_progress

comments.title: Review approved
comments.content: Spec, implementation, and tests all aligned. guardTransition correctly allows backlog→todo and todo→in_progress. Unit tests (55 pass) and E2E test (1 pass) confirm the full chain works. No issues found.

comments.title: Review approved
comments.content: Spec, implementation, and tests aligned. need_info without comment correctly returns missing_comment. With comment, transition succeeds and hook fires. No issues found.

title: Review: update_task: blocked requires non-empty comment
update_task: leave need_info only after all replies
definition_of_done: Transitioning out of need_info without replying to all need_info comments returns -32003
description: Move task to need_info with a comment, then attempt to transition to in_progress without replying to the need_info comment, expect -32003

comments.title: Blocking question
comments.content: What is the expected behavior when reply is empty string?
comments.reply: Empty string triggers validation_error; non-empty string is required for blocked transitions.

title: Review: update_task: leave need_info only after all replies
Review: update_task: reply cycle completes need_info
Review: update_task: invalid transition done → in_progress

comments.title: Review approved
comments.content: Spec, implementation, and tests all aligned. currentTask correctly filters by session and sorts ascending by in_progress_since (FIFO). Edge cases covered: no in_progress tasks returns no_current_task, session isolation enforced, oldest task returned when multiple exist. Unit tests (3 pass) and MCP tool tests (4 pass) confirm behavior. No issues found.

title: Review: update_task: second in_progress requires justification

comments.title: Review approved
comments.content: Fibonacci estimation derivation verified. Formula (scaled = kTokens / 2.5, nearest Fibonacci with UP tie-breaking) is correctly implemented in src/domain/kTokens.ts:40-64. Unit tests confirm kTokens=5→2, kTokens=8→3, kTokens=20→8. Edge cases (0, negative, >max) properly validated. 100% line coverage. Tests: 7/7 pass (kTokens), 13/13 pass (create-task). No issues found.

title: Review: create_task: validation failure on missing required field

comments.title: Review approved
comments.content: Spec, implementation, and tests aligned. Zod validation for all required fields (project, milestone, title, definition_of_done, description, predictedKTokens) correctly rejects missing/empty values and maps to -32602 Invalid params at server.ts:285. E2E test (193) and unit tests (81-100) cover the full validation matrix. All 27 tests pass.

comments.title: Review approved
comments.content: list_tasks with status=backlog correctly returns only backlog-status tasks. Verified: 3 fib-probe tasks returned, all with status 'backlog'. Filtering works as specified.

title: Review: list_tasks: wildcard returns all statuses
Review: list_tasks: empty result for status with no tasks

comments.title: Review approved
comments.content: Verified: list_tasks with status='need_info' (no tasks in that state) correctly returns {"tasks":[]} — an empty array. Implementation matches spec requirement. No issues found.

title: Review: current_task: error when no in_progress tasks
Review: edit_task: mutable fields update correctly [EDITED]

comments.title: Review approved
comments.content: Spec, implementation, and tests all aligned. editTask correctly re-derives Fibonacci estimation from predictedKTokens via estimateFromKTokens. Unit test confirms 8 kTokens → estimation=3. Error cases (max exceeded, not_found, status rejection) all covered. 7/7 unit tests pass. No issues found.

comments.title: Review approved
comments.content: edit_task correctly rejects status field at three layers: TypeScript type (EditTaskInput omits status), Zod schema (status not in schema), and domain runtime guard ("status" in updates → validation_error). Domain test bypasses type system to verify the runtime guard. All 16 tests pass (7 domain + 9 MCP). Error maps to -32003 at JSON-RPC layer. No issues found.
